contractTypes.title: General Services Agreement
contractTypes.desc: Regulates the provision of professional services that do not require a specialized Contract Type.
contractTypes.previewText: This Agreement is entered into between [CLIENT_NAME], with registered address at [CLIENT_ADDRESS] ("Client"), and [PROVIDER_NAME], with registered address at [PROVIDER_ADDRESS] ("Service Provider"), collectively "the Parties."

contractTypes.title: Freelance Services Agreement
contractTypes.previewText: This Agreement is entered into between [CLIENT_NAME] ("Client") and [PROVIDER_NAME], acting as an independent, self-employed professional ("Freelancer").

contractTypes.title: Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA)
contractTypes.desc: Protects confidential information exchanged between parties.
contractTypes.previewText: This Agreement is entered into between [DISCLOSING_PARTY_NAME] and [RECEIVING_PARTY_NAME] (each a "Party" and together the "Parties") in connection with [PURPOSE_OF_DISCLOSURE].

contractTypes.title: Non-Compete Agreement
contractTypes.desc: Restricts competitive activities under predefined legal conditions.
contractTypes.previewText: This Agreement is entered into between [COMPANY_NAME] ("Company") and [RESTRICTED_PARTY_NAME], acting in the capacity of [RESTRICTED_PARTY_ROLE] ("Restricted Party").

contractTypes.title: Copyright Assignment Agreement
contractTypes.previewText: This Agreement is entered into between [ASSIGNOR_NAME] ("Assignor") and [ASSIGNEE_NAME] ("Assignee").

contractTypes.title: Software License Agreement
contractTypes.previewText: This Agreement is entered into between [LICENSOR_NAME] ("Licensor") and [LICENSEE_NAME] ("Licensee") regarding [SOFTWARE_NAME].

contractTypes.title: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
contractTypes.previewText: This Agreement is entered into between [SERVICE_PROVIDER_NAME] ("Provider") and [CLIENT_NAME] ("Client") regarding [SERVICE_DESCRIPTION].

contractTypes.title: Commission Agreement
contractTypes.previewText: This Agreement is entered into between [COMPANY_NAME] ("Company") and [AGENT_NAME] ("Agent").

contractTypes.title: Reseller Agreement
contractTypes.previewText: This Agreement is entered into between [SUPPLIER_NAME] ("Supplier") and [RESELLER_NAME] ("Reseller").

contractTypes.title: Partnership Agreement
contractTypes.previewText: This Agreement is entered into between [PARTNER_A_NAME] and [PARTNER_B_NAME] (each a "Partner" and together the "Parties") for the purpose defined in the Objectives Clause.
